author: lOrm
content: Superseded by #275: DisplayMessage::system/error/user/assistant constructors are defined in src/tui/messages.rs:264-291 and used at 30+ call sites in src/tui/app.rs. Only 3 raw struct literals remain — they dispatch by runtime Role variant and cannot collapse to a single named constructor. The reported '30+ boilerplate occurrences' is gone.
